description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a wide, nearly bezel-less screen with a subtle, dark frame and a central, low-profile stand. The back is solid and unadorned, likely housing the internal electronics and mounting points. The side views reveal the television's extremely thin depth, emphasizing its contemporary design. The stand appears to be metallic or plastic, providing stable support for the wide screen. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin profile, wide display, and minimalist stand. The design is contemporary and nearly bezel-less.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display with a thin bezel and a central stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extremely slim profile and the depth of the central stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, unadorned back panel and the base of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness and the central stand's depth.
attribute_bezel_design: thin, black, matte plastic bezel with minimal thickness and no distinctive styling features
